terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.s1_text: Welcome to VendeT-Venezuela. By using our platform, you accept these terms and conditions. If you disagree with any of these terms, do not use our services.
terms.s2_text: VendeT-Venezuela is a classified ads platform that connects buyers and sellers. We are not part of transactions: we don't handle payments or deliveries, and we're not responsible for listed products.
terms.s3_text: Users can post ads for free. By posting an ad, you declare that:
terms.s3_li1: The product is legitimate and legal for sale.
terms.s3_li2: Photos and descriptions are truthful and correspond to the actual product.
terms.s3_li3: You have the legal right to sell the product.
terms.s3_text2: Illegal, stolen, counterfeit, dangerous products, or those that violate third-party rights are prohibited.
terms.s4_text: Credits are a virtual currency used to feature listings. Credits are non-refundable and have no value outside the platform.
terms.s5_text: Not allowed: spam, scams, fake listings, offensive content, or posting personal data of others without their consent.
terms.s6_text: VendeT-Venezuela does not guarantee the truthfulness of listings or the quality of transactions. Users act at their own risk. We recommend taking precautions during transactions.
terms.s7_text: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes take effect when published.
terms.s8_text: For questions about these terms: legal@vendet.online

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1_text: We collect the information you provide when registering (name, email, phone, location) and your listing information (photos, descriptions, prices).
privacy.s3_text: We don't sell or share your personal data with third parties. Your email is never publicly visible unless you choose so. Your contact information is only shared with your consent.
privacy.s4_text: We use industry-standard security measures to protect your data, including encrypted connections (HTTPS) and secure storage.
privacy.s5_text: You can request the deletion of your account and all your data at any time from your profile settings or by writing to privacidad@vendet.online.
privacy.s6_text: We use essential cookies for site functionality and optional cookies for analytics. You can manage your preferences in your browser settings.

about.title: About VendeT
about.subtitle: The marketplace built for Venezuela.
about.whoP1: VendeT is a marketplace designed specifically for Venezuelans. It was born from the need for a platform where buying and selling is easy, direct and hassle-free. We believe local commerce deserves modern tools that don't depend on middlemen charging abusive commissions.
about.whoP2: Our team understands commerce in Venezuela firsthand. We know what it means to sell something you no longer use, find the product you need at a good price, and avoid the 10-15% commissions other platforms charge. That's why we created VendeT: so the price you set is the price you receive.
about.missionP1: Facilitate commerce among Venezuelans. We want anyone to be able to post what they sell and find buyers in their city quickly, safely and without hidden costs. No middlemen, no sales commissions, no fine print.
about.missionP2: Every Venezuelan should be able to sell what they have or find what they need, without barriers. Whether it's a car in Maracaibo, a phone in Caracas, or construction materials in Valencia — VendeT connects sellers with buyers.
about.why1_desc: The price you set is the price you receive. We don't touch your money.
about.why2_desc: Internal chat + WhatsApp so you can arrange everything without leaving the platform.
about.why3_desc: From Maracaibo to Caracas, your ad reaches all of Venezuela.
about.why4_desc: Posting doesn't cost a cent. Optional credits to feature your listings.
about.ctaDesc: Join thousands of Venezuelans already buying and selling on VendeT.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: We answer your questions about buying, selling, and featuring your listings on VendeT-Venezuela
faq.q1: Is it safe to use VendeT-Venezuela?
faq.a1: VendeT-Venezuela connects buyers and sellers directly. We always recommend meeting in public places, verifying the product before paying, and being wary of prices that are too low. Never send money in advance.
faq.a2: No, you need to create an account to post. Registration is free and takes less than a minute.
faq.q3: How many listings can I have?
faq.a3: No limit. You can post as many products as you want, always free.
faq.a4: Credits are an optional internal currency to feature your listings. With credits you can make your product appear first in searches and on the homepage.
faq.q5: What payment methods do you accept for credits?
faq.a5: Mobile payment, bank transfer, Zelle, Binance Pay (USDT) and PayPal. We're adding more methods progressively.
faq.q6: Does VendeT-Venezuela handle payments or shipping?
faq.a6: No. VendeT-Venezuela is a platform connecting buyers and sellers. Payment and delivery are arranged directly between the parties.
faq.q7: How do I report a fraudulent listing?
faq.a7: Every listing has a "Report" button. You can also write to us at soporte@vendet.online with the details.
faq.a8: Prices are posted in USD (dollars). The equivalent in bolivars at the reference rate is also shown.
faq.q9: How do I contact a seller?
faq.a9: Each listing has a direct message button, WhatsApp and phone (if the seller enabled it). You can also use VendeT's built-in chat.
faq.q10: Can I sell cars or real estate on VendeT?
faq.a10: Yes. VendeT accepts all types of classified ads: vehicles, real estate (rental and sale), technology, fashion, home, tools, materials, spare parts and more.
faq.q11: Is it free to post on VendeT-Venezuela?
faq.a11: Yes, posting is 100% free. Credits are optional and only serve to feature your listing and reach more buyers.
faq.noAnswerDesc: Write to us and we'll help you

deleteAccount.title: Delete your VendeT account
deleteAccount.subtitle: You can request the complete deletion of your account and all associated data on VendeT-Venezuela.
deleteAccount.howP1: Send an email to privacidad@vendet.online with the subject "Delete account — VendeT".
deleteAccount.howLi1: The email address associated with your VendeT account
deleteAccount.howLi2: The phrase "I request the complete deletion of my account"
deleteAccount.howP2: We will process your request within 72 hours and confirm by the same email when completed.
deleteAccount.delLi1: Your profile (name, email, phone, photo, city)
deleteAccount.delLi2: All your active and inactive listings
deleteAccount.keptText: We only retain the minimum records necessary to comply with legal obligations and resolve disputes. This data is stored anonymously and automatically deleted after a period of 30 days.
deleteAccount.contactText: For any questions about your data: privacidad@vendet.online

howItWorks.heroSubtitle: Buy and sell in Venezuela in 4 simple steps. Post for free and start receiving messages today.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Create your account, upload photos of your product, set a USD price and describe what you're selling. No commissions, no fine print. Posting is 100% free.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Your listing appears on the homepage, catalog, and searches across Venezuela. Real buyers looking for what you offer, right in your city.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Buyers write to you via internal chat, WhatsApp or phone (if enabled). No middlemen, no commissions. You decide the price and payment method.
howItWorks.step4Desc: ID-verified profiles, ad moderation, and reputation system. Buy and sell with confidence. If something's wrong, report it.
howItWorks.faq1a: Yes. Every seller gets 1 free credit to post their first listing. If you want to feature your listing for more visibility, you can buy additional credits.
howItWorks.faq2a: Credits are purchased from the "Credits" section. We accept mobile payment, bank transfer, Zelle, Binance Pay (USDT) and PayPal. It's always cheaper in bulk.
howItWorks.faq3a: Payment is arranged directly with the buyer. VendeT doesn't handle payments. Accept transfers, cash, mobile payment, or whatever works for you.
howItWorks.faq4a: No. We don't charge sales commission. Your listing is visible and the price you set is what you receive.
howItWorks.faq5a: Click "Sign up" in the header. You can use your email or Google account. It's fast and free. Your account is active in under a minute.
howItWorks.faq6q: Can I sell cars, real estate or services?
howItWorks.faq6a: Yes. VendeT accepts all types of classified ads: vehicles, real estate (rental and sale), technology, fashion, home, tools, construction materials, spare parts and more.

installApp.title: Install the VendeT App
installApp.subtitle: You don't need to search any app store. VendeT is a progressive web app (PWA) that installs directly from your browser. In 3 steps!
installApp.androidReq: Requirement: Use Google Chrome on your Android
installApp.androidStep1Title: Open Chrome and go to vendet.online
installApp.androidStep1Desc: Make sure you're on the correct URL. If you already have the page open, great.
installApp.androidStep2Title: Tap the 3-dot menu (⋮) at the top right
installApp.androidStep3Title: Find and tap "Install app" or "Add to home screen"
installApp.androidStep3Desc: Depending on your Chrome version, you'll see one of these options. A banner at the bottom may also say "Install VendeT".
installApp.androidStep4Desc: A confirmation dialog will appear. Tap "Install". Done! You now have VendeT as an app on your home screen.
installApp.iosReq: Requirement: Use Safari on your iPhone
installApp.iosStep1Title: Open Safari and go to vendet.online
installApp.iosStep1Desc: ⚠️ Important: Doesn't work with Chrome, Firefox or other browsers on iPhone. Only Safari allows app installation.
installApp.iosStep2Desc: It's in the Safari bar at the bottom of the screen (on iPhones with Face ID it's at the top in the bar).
installApp.iosStep3Title: Scroll down until you see "Add to Home Screen"
installApp.iosStep3Desc: It's a bit further down in the share menu. If you don't see it, scroll more.
installApp.iosStep4Desc: You can change the name if you want. Then tap "Add" in the top right corner. Done!
installApp.why1desc: An icon on your home screen. Open with one tap, no bookmark searching.
installApp.why2desc: Loads without the browser bar. Experience similar to a native app.
installApp.why3desc: Get alerts for messages and new listings without opening the app.
installApp.why4desc: You can view the last page you visited even without connection.
